content.body:
Hi all, this may have already been discussed but i might have missed it. I was wondering about the discrepancy between first CRA obligations coming into effect september 2026 and the citation on harmonised standards in the EU Official Journal in december 2026. Does that mean that manufacturers won't be able to use standards for complying with september's obligations? or would they still be able to follow the standars even if they won't be cited in the journal yet?

Thanks!
